resume_text: Experienced Python developer with backend and cloud infrastructure skills

payload.role_summary: The senior backend engineer at Creative Fabrica will develop scalable server-side applications using Node.js for managing subscriptions and user data across their global community of artists and craftspeople.

The position requires designing high complexity systems using Spring Boot in cloud native architectures while ensuring system integrity and availability through distributed architecture strategies such as Microservices Resilience Patterns like Circuit Breaker & Bulkhead patterns; it also demands expertise in Domain-Driven Design for software development along with experience working on financial sector projects utilizing AI technologies including Retrieval Augmentation Generation models within an environment focused on scalable containerization via Docker running on Google Cloud services.

The role entails comprehensive training on key data analytics software like Excel, SQL, Python, Tableau, and Power BI; obtaining three industry-standard certifications; gaining hands-on workplace projects; participating in an extensive career program aimed at ensuring job preparedness and securing positions within 30 days following graduation from the program.

The candidate will build scalable services, collaborate with teams, drive architectural directions, partner with PMs & ML experts, manage engineer development, identify skill gaps, and contribute to improving processes within Jane Technologies’ growing tech environment.

Provide tier 1/tier 2 support for a Grants Management System; respond to and resolve user support requests through various channels; troubleshoot software issues related to user access, reports, and workflows; track and escalate high priority tickets; develop and update user manuals and conduct training sessions; test new features during development phases.
